action_id.description: Identifier of a saved local action approved for remote execution.

idempotency_key.description: Required remote idempotency key. Reusing the same key for the same action returns the existing execution; reusing it with a different allowed payload is rejected. When enableSocketIdempotency is active, successful responses are cached in SQLite as agent.action.run:{key} with TTL from AGENT_ACTION_RPC_IDEMPOTENCY_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS (default min(execution retention, 24h)). Dedup after cache expiry uses persisted agent_action_execution rows until history retention (AGENT_ACTION_EXECUTION_RETENTION_DAYS, default 3 days).

trace_id.description: Optional distributed trace id for execution and remote audit correlation. When omitted, the agent uses meta.trace_id or W3C traceparent.

requested_by.description: Optional hub requester identity for execution metadata and remote audit. When omitted, the agent derives a safe value from RPC meta.

trigger_id.description: Optional enabled remote trigger id. Required when the action has more than one enabled remote trigger; otherwise the sole enabled remote trigger is selected automatically.

client_token.description: Opaque token or JWT for authorization when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active. Aliases: clientToken, auth
